title: Tennessee calls special session to draw new maps at behest of Trump
shortDescription: The legislature will redistrict Memphis, carving the city into multiple safe-Republican seats, at the behest of President Donald Trump.

title: Pickleball and MAGA. Trump visits raucous Florida retirees amid falling ratings
shortDescription: Thousands of Trump-loving seniors packed a school gymnasium to see the president in Florida, while hundreds protested nearby.

title: Texas voters decide Senate District 4 seat in Saturday special election
shortDescription: A special election for Texas State Senate District 4 is set for May 2, 2026. Learn about the candidates and who can vote.

title: Ex-congressman, Rubio friend guilty of secretly lobbying for Venezuela
shortDescription: A federal jury found David Rivera, a Republican from Miami who served in the House from 2011 to 2013, guilty for his role in a secret $50 million campaign.

title: Trump tells Congress hostilities in Iran 'have terminated'
shortDescription: Troops remain stationed in the region as the White House tries to find ways to legally justify its actions without full congressional approval.

title: Trump: War powers resolution is ‘unconstitutional’
shortDescription: Amid a deadline for military authorization in Iran, President Trump called a war powers resolution seeking congressional approval "unconstitutional."

title: Illinois Republicans push SAFE-T Act reform after national cash bail end
shortDescription: Illinois GOP lawmakers are meeting to propose changes to the SAFE-T Act following a federal order ending cashless bail across the U.S., citing serious concerns with the current law.

title: Trump says UFC arena construction starting soon
shortDescription: In June, the White House is hosting a UFC event on the South Lawn. President Donald Trump told reporters arena construction will start soon.

title: Trump ramps up pressure on Cuba with new sanctions
shortDescription: President Donald Trump imposed new sanctions on Cuba as he threatens the communist-run Caribbean nation with military action.

title: Alabama calls special session aiming to redraw Congress maps
shortDescription: Alabama Gov. Kay Ivey called a special legislative session starting May 4 aiming to redraw the state's congressional maps.

title: Poll: How do Americans think of Trump's ballroom and DC arch?
shortDescription: In a poll by the Washington Post and ABC News, Americans were asked their views on President Donald Trump's White House ballroom and DC arch.

title: Trump says UFC transformation at White House to begin soon
shortDescription: President Trump on May 1 said construction will begin over the next week on a structure to hold a UFC event on the South Lawn of the White House.

title: Trump threatens higher EU car tariffs
shortDescription: President Donald Trump threatened to raise tariffs on European Union cars to 25%, claiming the European Union "did not adhere to the trade deal."

title: Trump ‘not satisfied’ with current Iran deal
shortDescription: President Trump said they have made strides but that he is "not satisfied" with the current offer from Iran to end the conflict.

title: Trump threatens EU with 25% tariffs on cars and trucks
shortDescription: Trump threatened to impose 25% tariffs on cars and trucks imported from the European Union by accusing those countries of violating a trade deal.

title: Farm bill clears US House. See how Texas lawmakers voted, why
shortDescription: The U.S. House passed the farm bill, drawing praise from Texas agriculture leaders and split votes from state Democrats.

title: It’s day 60 since Trump announced the war in Iran, a critical deadline | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Per the War Powers Resolution, President Trump must now seek congressional approval to continue military operations in the war on Iran.

title: Will Congress ok the Iran war or will Trump just continue it anyway?
shortDescription: In testimony at the Senate Armed Services Committee, SecDef Hegseth argued that the working ceasefire with Iran pauses the 60-day deadline.
